items.html: First we shall clarify, in a general way, the growth of the female over the course of the twelve years and one day, through the Hasadim [mercies] and Gevurot [judgments], which cause the growth. Afterwards we shall return and clarify this matter in detail, in the discernments of the Mochin [minds] themselves, and also in the discernments of the Hasadim and Gevurot — and how each and every point of the ten points grows and becomes one Sefira comprising ten points.
